specific_mechanism: new SDE-noise injection module introducing new learnable diffusion parameter and new learnable noise gate (new computation graph edges)
llm_application: new SDE-noise injection module: introduce a NEW learnable module with its own parameters (new learnable diffusion parameter) implementing new SDE-noise injection module; the module adds new learnable noise gate between existing layers, creating new stochastic pathway that the baseline lacks; module is NOT a function of existing parameters
